transcript: Boss, I got some bad news for you. What do you mean, bad news? I'm at the Pussy Drop, man. Keep talking. You know those runners? They got jammed. Did they find the bag? No. So how do you plan on fixing this? I mean, I was thinking we could just... Look, I don't care if your brothers and sisters got to go out there and do the job. It's happening. Tonight. Man, they're only seven years old. I don't give a... I don't care. They can either run or watch their brother and mother get buried. I called out a two-for-one special. They get the fuck out of my face! Kendra! Get your ass over here. What you need me to do? Call Jay and let him know we're still good. And assure him that everything will be good and smooth. And I look forward to doing more business with him in the future. Okay, done. I had a question. Where are you really going to make kids go? Proverbs 22 and 6. Train up a child in the way that he should go. Okay. I was just asking. Let me go make that call. Oh, and Kendra. Where are those two idiots locked up at? Rice Street. Call Officer Smith and him and tell them to handle it.'ll make it look like a suicide. That'll be all. Yeah, I got the rumors. Look, look, I'm going to call you right back. Watch this shit right here. Hey, yellow ball. There you go, that look-alike shit. You know what? Yellow ball, corner pocket. Yeah, you ain't going to hear that. Shut up, man. Shut up. I don't know what you're talking about. How you playing? What's up, beautiful people? How y'all doing today? Any plans tonight? What the hell you want? Can't check on my people? Nah. Alright, alright, y'all got me, y'all got me. Yeah, every time your ass come around, you need something, so what's up? Look, it's a business deal, you know what I'm talking about. Business? You ain't even got no business. You in the streets. What? You need business to be in the streets. It's called economics. Didn't you just graduate college? Idiot. Wait. Alright, let's hear him out. Look, all you gotta do is get the package, give it to me, ship it. That's it. 50k. And what's in the bag? Nah, so we're not even worried about what's in the bag. What's the pay? My type of girl. Look, $50,000 a person, all we got to do is finish the job. You're telling me $50,000 split three ways just to pick up a bag? Bro, you would get me for real. $50,000 a person, man. That's what, boys. Wait, what? Why? Yo, chill, man Listen, she can go sideways though. So be ready. Be ready. Where's Dawn? Alright. So they sent the rejects. The man losing his touch. of the research. All right. So they sent the rejects. The man losing his touch. Man, you got the bag or what? You know what's funny I really thought about keeping both the bags Bitch you really testing my patience Now come on before I decide to kill you You know what's funny Your future is really behind you I read that one in the book What the fuck that's supposed to mean? Axiom. I'm grabbing the bass. Let's go.
